urdu transliteration text: Isi liye to Ali phir koi bana hi nahiKhuda ke paas koi aur fatema hi nahi For this reason Ali was only created onceGod did not have another Fatima

english translation text: Ajeeb baat hai nabiyon se tu mila hi nahinMere khayaal me tu karbala gaya hi nahinIt is strange that you say you have never met the AmbiyiaPerhaps you have never been to Karbala

Hai ek zarb ki qeemat ibadat e ThaqalaynAbhi to sajda Ali ka koi tula hi nahinOne strike of Ali is greater than the ibadat of thaqlaynYet, they are still to weigh the greatness of the prayers of Ali

Kamaal hai Ali Asgher, gaye, lare, jeeteMagar zameen pa koi nakshe pa mila hi nahinIt is amazing that Ali Asgher went, fought and conquered. But there is not even one footprint of his to be found anywhere
